description_long: This is a rustic wooden directional sign consisting of a thick cylindrical post supporting a flat, arrow-shaped board. The board is attached horizontally and features hand-painted, slightly faded text that reads 'Potions', giving it a whimsical or fantasy-themed appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a dark brown stain that suggests outdoor use and weather resistance. The sign is fastened with visible metal bolts at the top and bottom of the board, securing it to the post. The reverse side of the sign is plain, with no visible text or markings. The overall construction is sturdy, making it suitable for placement in parks, themed urban areas, or event spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden directional sign with an arrow-shaped board and hand-painted 'Potions' text, mounted on a cylindrical post with visible bolts.
description_view_0: The front view shows the arrow-shaped board with the word 'Potions' clearly visible and the wood grain texture prominent.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thickness of the board and post, with the sign's profile and mounting bolts visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain back of the arrow board, showing no text or markings, and the cylindrical post.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the thickness of the board and post, with the mounting structure visible.
attribute_location_context: urban park, themed event area, or fantasy-themed street
